chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Ist. Appeal No.D-01 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on statement. 12.01.2021 Mr. Muhammad Yaseen advocate for appellant. === This statement has been filed on behalf of the appellant stating that the respondent has settled the outstanding amount payable to the appellant- bank. In view of the above, learned counsel for the appellant states that the appeal has served its purpose. Accordingly, the appeal, having served its purpose, stands disposed of with no order as to costs. JUDGE. JUDGE. g
